Clinical team championship

Welcome to Lisbon

The European Association for Osseointegration is delighted to announce that its 33rd annual congress will take place in Lisbon from 24 to 26 September 2026. The theme will be ‘Delivering Health and Predictability: Shaping the Future of Patient Care’.

The meeting will explore innovative approaches to advancing health and ensuring predictability in clinical practice. It will bring together the world’s leading experts, offering unparalleled opportunities to engage with cutting-edge research, technologies and practices that are shaping the future of patient care.

A hallmark of the 2026 Congress will be our commitment to collaboration. We are proud to announce a special partnership with the Brazilian Society of Periodontics and Implants (SOBRAPI), bringing together global expertise to enrich discussions, share perspectives, and collectively shape the future of our field.

Lisbon is known for its stunning location and blend of historic charm and modern energy. It will provide an inspirational backdrop for one of the most important events in the field of osseointegration. This is the second EAO Congress to be held in Lisbon, and we are looking forward to welcoming you as a participant. We have created a programme that will inspire learning, collaboration and meaningful connections by bringing together dental professionals, researchers and industry leaders from across the globe.

We invite you to join us in Lisbon, a city that combines tradition and progress. Together, let’s make the EAO Congress 2026 an unforgettable milestone in the advancement of dental and implantology practice.

Warmest regards,

Helena
Francisco
EAO

Sérgio
Kahn
SOBRAPI
